fragments.plaintext:
The Winner's Curse.

Every ring. Every medal. Every record. His hunger is insatiable. Doesn't matter if it's his 1st or 4th
@olympics
games, LeBron James has no choice but to try to win again. Paris2024

caption.text:
The Winner's Curse.

Every ring. Every medal. Every record. His hunger is insatiable. Doesn't matter if it's his 1st or 4th @olympics games, LeBron James has no choice but to try to win again. Paris2024

fragments.plaintext: Crafted for Vision like
@sabrina_i

The Sabrina 2 was made for hoopers of all ages who work tirelessly on their game and do it all on the court.
